html:
2026-0278
2026-03-30IRCCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActRegulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Provincial Nominee Program) Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Provincial Nominee Program) in order to (1) replace the criteria for membership in the Provincial Nominee Class, including the authority of a federal officer to substitute an assessment by the province or territory; and (2) establish that the nominating province or territory has the sole responsibility to assess the person's ability to establish in Canada and intent to reside in the nominating province or territory.Registration: SOR/2026-0063 Publication Date: 2026-04-08
subject: Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Provincial Nominee Program)
precis: Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Provincial Nominee Program) in order to (1) replace the criteria for membership in the Provincial Nominee Class, including the authority of a federal officer to substitute an assessment by the province or territory; and (2) establish that the nominating province or territory has the sole responsibility to assess the person's ability to establish in Canada and intent to reside in the nominating province or territory.
